name: ArchON Note
description: Sticky notes on the canvas — click the icon to drop a note, drag to move, double-click to edit, pick from a 16-color palette and a Sans Serif / Permanent Marker font toggle.
author: Surecom
longDescription:
# ArchON Note

Lightweight sticky-note layer for the ArchON canvas. Drop notes anywhere on the diagram, drag them around, resize them, pick a background color and a font, write text — all of it persists with the project and participates in global undo/redo.

## Highlights

- **One click on the icon = new note.** A sticky drops in the viewport center; nothing else opens — the plugin lives directly on the canvas.
- **Miro-like interaction.** Single-click selects (1.5 px blue outline + 8 resize handles + delete X + a small Palette button above the resize grid). Double-click enters edit mode. ESC or click-outside deselects.
- **Smart styling popup.** Tap the Palette button to open a popover with a 16-color palette + a Sans Serif / Permanent Marker font toggle. The popup is auto-positioned to stay inside the canvas viewport AND avoid covering the note's text — it tries above, below, right, then left of the note.
- **Dynamic font sizing.** Empty notes get a large prominent caret; as you type, the font shrinks to fit the box. No manual sizing.
- **Permanent Marker handwritten font.** Loaded asynchronously from Google Fonts with a Caveat fallback for Cyrillic text.
- **Zero-lag camera follow.** Each note has its own rAF loop that mutates DOM directly via refs — pan and zoom feel as smooth as the canvas itself, with no React re-render lag. Wheel events that land on a note are forwarded to the canvas so panning over a sticky never halts.
- **Touch / mobile friendly.** All interactive elements declare `touch-action: none` so drag-resize works without breaking through to page-scroll. Resize handles have a 28×28 finger-sized hit area around the visible 10×10 circle; the delete X has a 32×32 hit area around its 20×20 visible button.
- **Delete / Backspace shortcut.** When a note is selected, pressing Delete or Backspace deletes it (skipped while focus is in any input).
- **First-class persistence.** Notes live in `installedPlugins['archon-note'].pluginData` — saved with the project (JSON, Google Drive, localStorage), restored on load.
- **Full undo/redo.** Every add, delete, move, resize, color change and text edit is reversible via global Cmd+Z (the plugin uses `applyPluginDataDelta`, not `setPluginData`, so changes participate in the host's history stack).
- **Respects view mode.** No mutations, drags, or new notes when the project is in view-only mode.
- **Respects drawing mode.** Notes dim to opacity 0.55 and stop intercepting pointer events while you're drawing on the canvas.

## Data shape

```
installedPlugins['archon-note'].pluginData = {
  notes: { [id]: { id, position, size, text, bgColor, fontFamily } },
  noteOrder: string[]   // last-on-top z-order
}
```

`fontFamily` is `'sans' | 'marker'`. Legacy `'serif'` from older builds is migrated to `'marker'` on read. See `docs/DATA_MODEL.md` inside the plugin for the full schema and migration rules.
